steps.title: Set up the total earnings inequality
steps.content:
Total earnings consist of base salary $$x$$ plus commission $$0.11s$$ (since commission is 11% of sales $$s$$).
The goal is that total earnings be at least $$3x$$ and at most $$4x$$:
$$3x \le x + 0.11s \le 4x$$

steps.title: Solve for s
steps.content:
Subtract $$x$$ from each part:
$$3x - x \le 0.11s \le 4x - x$$ simplifies to $$2x \le 0.11s \le 3x$$.
Divide by $$0.11$$ (positive, so inequality direction stays):
$$\frac{2x}{0.11} \le s \le \frac{3x}{0.11}$$
This matches the form in choice B.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
